name: ExtensionSpecimen_Collection_Procedure
title: R5: The procedure that collects the specimen (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Specimen.collection.procedure` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Specimen.collection.procedure` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Procedure)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Specimen.collection.procedure` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Procedure)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Specimen.collection.procedure` has a context of Specimen.collection based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Specimen`.
Element `Specimen.collection.procedure` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The procedure that collects the specimen (new)
element.comment:
Element `Specimen.collection.procedure` has a context of Specimen.collection based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Specimen`.
Element `Specimen.collection.procedure` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: The procedure that collects the specimen
element.definition: The procedure event during which the specimen was collected (e.g. the surgery leading to the collection of a pathology sample).
